title: Set Of 2 Scented Hanging Wardrobe Dehumidifiers Damp Mould Condensation Control (Lavender)
features: Set Of 2 Scented Hanging Wardrobe Dehumidifiers Helps prevent Damp Mould Condensation Mildew. Specially designed to remove moisture from wardrobe. Choice of 3 scents. Quick and easy to use. The special crystals draw moisture from the surrounding atmosphere traps it inside the dehumidifier. 210g per dehumidifier. PLEASE NOTE THAT PRODUCT IS NOT REUSABLE ONE FULL.
description: Product description Colour: Lavender Set Of 2 Scented Hanging Wardrobe Dehumidifiers Helps prevent Damp Mould Condensation Mildew. Specially designed to remove moisture from wardrobe. Choice of 3 scents. Quick and easy to use. The special crystals draw moisture from the surrounding atmosphere traps it inside the dehumidifier. 210g per dehumidifier. PLEASE NOTE THAT PRODUCT IS NOT REUSABLE ONE FULL. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. For individuals with known allergies, be cautious around product ingredients. This product is not reusable.
